data.body: Investigation: test passes standalone (bash tests/scripts/test-bridge-observability-e2e.sh exits 0). Failure only occurs in test-batched.sh with multiple SIGURG interruptions. Root cause is likely that test-batched.sh exits on SIGURG without killing the subprocess (CMD_PID), causing the subprocess to complete and clean up its temp dirs. On resume, test-batched.sh re-runs the test. If macOS or the previous run's EXIT trap cleaned up the temp dirs between runs, the re-run creates fresh dirs and should succeed. The exact failure mode requires empirical reproduction with controlled SIGURG events — not reproducible analytically.
